top.name: Grand Weave
top.rules_text: For 3 turns: every spell you cast this turn echoes at the start of your next turn for free. Echoes can echo creating a cascade. Each echo deals -2 damage (min 1).

channel.name: Grand Weave (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: No damage reduction on echoes

bottom.name: Spell Sovereign
bottom.rules_text: Permanent: you may cast bottom halves as Reactions. Your charges cap increases to 10. Whenever you reach 5+ charges all your spells deal +3 damage.

channel.name: Spell Sovereign (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Threshold is 3+ charges and bonus is +3
